title: Better Small Items+
description: Removing All large screen occuping things Into small !!!
body:
Key Features:

- Improved Visibility: Small hand models significantly reduce "View Bobbing" obstruction, giving you a better field of vision during PVP or building.

- GUI Consistency: While items are small in-world, they remain clear and high-definition in your inventory slots.

- Universal Compatibility: Works seamlessly with Minecraft versions 1.7 and 1.21+, including support for OptiFine or Iris/Sodium setups.
